attributes.description: Deep infrastructure monitoring for Supabase nodes — CPU, memory, disk I/O, filesystem, network, and VM stats via OpenTelemetry.

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_MemTotal_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_MemTotal_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_MemTotal_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_MemTotal_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Active_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Active_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Active_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Active_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Cached_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Cached_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Cached_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Cached_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Dirty_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Dirty_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Dirty_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Dirty_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.node_memory_Slab_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.node_memory_Slab_bytes`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE `metrics.node_memory_Slab_bytes` IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, `metrics.node_memory_Slab_bytes`
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Mapped_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Mapped_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_memory_Mapped_bytes IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_memory_Mapped_bytes
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Active Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Active_bytes)), `Inactive Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Inactive_bytes)), `Cached Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Cached_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Active Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Active_bytes)), `Inactive Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Inactive_bytes)), `Cached Memory (bytes)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Cached_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Dirty Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Dirty_bytes)), `Slab Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Slab_bytes)), `AnonPages Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_AnonPages_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Dirty Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Dirty_bytes)), `Slab Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_Slab_bytes)), `AnonPages Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_memory_AnonPages_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Page In (pgpgin)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.node_vmstat_pgpgin`)), `Page Out (pgpgout)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.node_vmstat_pgpgout`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Page In (pgpgin)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.node_vmstat_pgpgin`)), `Page Out (pgpgout)` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(`metrics.node_vmstat_pgpgout`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

attributes.title: Node VM Stat: Page In vs Page Out

embeddableConfig.title: Node VM Stat: Page In vs Page Out

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Page Faults` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_pgfault)), `Major Page Faults` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_pgmajfault)), `OOM Kills` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_oom_kill)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Page Faults` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_pgfault)), `Major Page Faults` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_pgmajfault)), `OOM Kills` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_vmstat_oom_kill)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Transmit Errors` = SUM(RATE(node_network_transmit_errs_total)), `Receive Compressed` = SUM(RATE(node_network_receive_compressed_total)), `Transmit Drops` = SUM(RATE(node_network_transmit_drop_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Transmit Errors` = SUM(RATE(node_network_transmit_errs_total)), `Receive Compressed` = SUM(RATE(node_network_receive_compressed_total)), `Transmit Drops` = SUM(RATE(node_network_transmit_drop_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Node Network: Transmit Errors, Receive Compressed & Transmit Drops

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Receive Packets` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_network_receive_packets_total`)), `Transmit Compressed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_network_transmit_compressed_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Receive Packets` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_network_receive_packets_total`)), `Transmit Compressed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_network_transmit_compressed_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Total CPU Seconds` = SUM(node_cpu_seconds_total) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Total CPU Seconds` = SUM(node_cpu_seconds_total) BY @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_cpu_online IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_cpu_online
| LIMIT 1

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_cpu_online IS NOT NULL
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| KEEP @timestamp, node_cpu_online
| LIMIT 1

columns.fieldName: Average Node CPU Seconds by Mode (user, system, idle, iowait)
columns.label: Average CPU Seconds

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.mode IN ("user", "system", "idle", "iowait")
| WHERE `metrics.node_cpu_seconds_total` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Average Node CPU Seconds by Mode (user, system, idle, iowait)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_cpu_seconds_total`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Mode` = attributes.mode
| SORT `Time` ASC, `Mode` ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.mode IN ("user", "system", "idle", "iowait")
| WHERE `metrics.node_cpu_seconds_total` IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Average Node CPU Seconds by Mode (user, system, idle, iowait)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_cpu_seconds_total`)) BY `Time` = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Mode` = attributes.mode
| SORT `Time` ASC, `Mode` ASC

attributes.title: Average Node CPU Seconds by Mode (user, system, idle, iowait)

embeddableConfig.title: Average Node CPU Seconds by Mode (user, system, idle, iowait)

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node CPU Guest Seconds` = SUM(RATE(node_cpu_guest_seconds_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node CPU Guest Seconds` = SUM(RATE(node_cpu_guest_seconds_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Read Bytes` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_read_bytes_total)), `Disk Written Bytes` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_written_bytes_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Read Bytes` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_read_bytes_total)), `Disk Written Bytes` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_written_bytes_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Reads Completed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_reads_completed_total`)), `Disk Writes Completed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_writes_completed_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Reads Completed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_reads_completed_total`)), `Disk Writes Completed` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_writes_completed_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk IO Time (seconds)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_io_time_seconds_total`)), `Disk Discard Time (seconds)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_discard_time_seconds_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk IO Time (seconds)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_io_time_seconds_total`)), `Disk Discard Time (seconds)` = SUM(RATE(`metrics.node_disk_discard_time_seconds_total`)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Reads Merged` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_reads_merged_total)), `Disk Discards Merged` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_discards_merged_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Disk Reads Merged` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_reads_merged_total)), `Disk Discards Merged` = SUM(RATE(node_disk_discards_merged_total)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node Filesystem Free Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_free_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node Filesystem Free Bytes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_free_bytes)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node Filesystem Files` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files)), `Node Filesystem Files Free` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files_free)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Node Filesystem Files` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files)), `Node Filesystem Files Free` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files_free)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT bucket ASC

attributes.title: Node Filesystem Files vs Free Files

embeddableConfig.title: Node Filesystem Files vs Free Files

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Free Bytes` = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_free_bytes)) BY `Device` = attributes.device, `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint
| WHERE `Free Bytes` IS NOT NULL
| SORT `Free Bytes` DESC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Free Bytes` = AVG(LAST_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_free_bytes)) BY `Device` = attributes.device, `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint
| WHERE `Free Bytes` IS NOT NULL
| SORT `Free Bytes` DESC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_filesystem_files IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Latest node_filesystem_files` = MAX(node_filesystem_files) BY mountpoint = attributes.mountpoint, device = attributes.device
| SORT `Latest node_filesystem_files` DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| WHERE node_filesystem_files IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Latest node_filesystem_files` = MAX(node_filesystem_files) BY mountpoint = attributes.mountpoint, device = attributes.device
| SORT `Latest node_filesystem_files` DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Free Inodes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files_free)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint
| SORT bucket ASC

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Free Inodes` = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_files_free)) BY bucket = TBUCKET(75, ?_tstart, ?_tend), `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint
| SORT bucket ASC

attributes.title: Filesystem Free Inodes by Mount Point Over Time

embeddableConfig.title: Filesystem Free Inodes by Mount Point

query.esql:
TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Read Only` = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_readonly)) BY `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint, `Device` = attributes.device
| WHERE `Read Only` IS NOT NULL

TS metrics-supabase.metrics.otel-*
| STATS `Read Only` = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(node_filesystem_readonly)) BY `Mountpoint` = attributes.mountpoint, `Device` = attributes.device
| WHERE `Read Only` IS NOT NULL

attributes.title: [Supabase OTel] Node & Infrastructure
